origin.capability_match: Submit Request for Reward Vault (RFRV) forms and post on Governance Forum for whitelisting

attack_surface.data_description: Maliciously crafted RFRV submission, including details of a Reward Vault contract with hidden functionalities.

security_gap.gap_description: The RFRV review process, relying on information from the Governance Forum (Component 223) and submitted forms, may not detect cleverly hidden backdoors or unfair economic advantages in a proposed Reward Vault smart contract.

actor_risk.description: If the malicious RFRV is approved, Actor 5 gains unauthorized control or economic benefits beyond standard protocol participation.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Successful exploitation allows the developer to steal user funds, unfairly gain PoL rewards, or disrupt the ecosystem, representing a significant elevation of their intended privileges.

assumptions: A Protocol Developer (Actor 5) is capable of designing and submitting a Reward Vault smart contract with hidden malicious features or unfair economic mechanics.

The RFRV review and whitelisting process, including scrutiny on the Governance Forum (223), may not be sufficiently rigorous or technically deep to identify all such malicious designs before approval.

mitigation.strategy: Mandate thorough, independent security audits and economic reviews for all smart contracts proposed in RFRVs. Establish clear, strict criteria for secure and fair Reward Vault design. Encourage active community technical review of proposals on the Governance Forum.

description: A malicious Protocol Developer (Actor 5) submits an RFRV for a Reward Vault contract via the Governance Forum (Component 223) or associated forms. The contract contains hidden backdoors, exploits, or unfair mechanisms designed to grant the developer unauthorized control over staked assets, siphon funds, or unfairly manipulate Proof-of-Liquidity emissions if the vault gets whitelisted. This elevates their privileges within the Berachain ecosystem beyond those of a standard protocol developer.

trace_source.matched_capability: Submit Request for Reward Vault (RFRV) forms and post on Governance Forum for whitelisting
